creator: nickdewing@gmail.com
text:
On 7/22/2013 12:46 PM, Steve Wills wrote:
> Hi,
>
> There is already a port for this rubygem, so this is an update. Unfortunately,
> GNATS didn't notice and send an approval request. Nick, could you approve this?
>
> In the future, please try to send updates as patches (and not tagged as new port).
>
> Thanks,
> Steve
>
> PS. Renaud, I have sent some PRs that require your approval, if you could
> approve them I would really appreciate it. The PRs are 180537 and 180732. Also,
> there were a number that were sent that didn't get approval, perhaps you are
> not getting the approval request mail from GNATS or it's getting caught in spam
> blocking?
>

I don't see any issues with the update, approved.

Sorry for the late reply.

-- 
Nick Dewing
